creator: freebsd@dns.company
text:
Created attachment 253809
libngtcp2 options v2

> Look like maintainer timeout > 2 weeks.
>
It's closed...
However in it's current state is not serving it's (only?) purpose (yet); enabling kdig to do DNS over Quic (DoQ).

I never noticed net/libngtcp2-gnutls also exist.
But when pointing to it, kdig fails to build.

Your instructions allowed me to accomplish what I was aiming for.
This modification (see patch) is exactly what I used for testing the patch in PR 281087 and is satisfieng all the validation tools (portlint, portfmt, portclippy and poudriere).

But I guess sunpoet created net/libngtcp2-gnutls with a reason in mind.
